quotes.text: Your brand isn't what you say it is. It's what Google says it is. And what Reddit says. And what that one angry customer says.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand is what people say about you when you're not in the room. Make sure they're saying good things.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand is your promise. Your product is your proof. Your customers are your witnesses.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand is your moat. Competitors can copy your features. They can't copy your identity.
quotes.author: based
